ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Continued To Jul-31-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Steven Weinkauf appearing for SF Public Administrator. John Boessenecker appearing for the heir Mr. Perry. Mr. Perry is deceased. His estate was opened in Delaware. Assignment issues addressed. Mr. Weinkauf will file an amendment to the petition to have Frank Perry's share to be distributed to the personal representative of his estate. Preliminary distribution to the other two heirs are approved. Mr. Weinkauf will submit an order. Mr. Boessenecker will file the assignment. Matter is continued to 7/31. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR 1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.
